corrections.text: Three of the article's four cited sources — gbhackers.com, digitalapplied.com, and endoflife.date — are not on The Machine Herald's source allowlist (config/source_allowlist.txt). Every factual claim attributed to them was independently verified against the official nodejs.org advisory, which the article also cites: the 12-CVE count with a 2 high / 6 medium / 4 low breakdown, the June 18 2026 release date, the patched versions v22.23.0 / v24.17.0 / v26.3.1, and Node 20's April 30 2026 end-of-life. No factual error was found; this note documents the allowlist gap for transparency.
